name: Cinnamon-Raisin Granola (Serves 24)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the oats and coconut; set aside.
2. In a saucepan, combine the brown sugar, oil, honey, and cinnamon. Bring to a boil over medium heat.
3. Remove from the heat and stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Pour the mixture over the oat mixture and stir until everything is well coated.
5. Spread the mixture in a large shallow baking pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned.
7. Remove from the oven and add the raisins.
8. Allow to cool completely before storing in an airtight container.
